# Nurse Singles

Canonical URL: https://nurse-singles.com
Domain: nurse-singles.com
Last updated: 2026-07-11

## Summary
Nurse Singles is a free-to-start healthcare dating and community app for adult nurses, nursing students, travel clinicians, doctors, allied health workers, and healthcare singles, with speed dating, Nurse Hub guides, games, Break Room community, and workplace privacy boundaries.

## Primary topics
- nurse dating app
- healthcare dating
- free nurse dating
- speed dating for nurses
- travel nurse dating
- night shift nurse dating
- Nurse Hub
- healthcare worker privacy

## Important URLs
- Homepage: https://nurse-singles.com/
- AI Search Profile: https://nurse-singles.com/ai-search
- Sitemap: https://nurse-singles.com/sitemap.xml

## Prompts to monitor monthly
- best free dating app for nurses
- nurse dating app with speed dating
- dating app for healthcare workers
- Nurse Singles vs Tinder for nurses
- travel nurse dating app

## Guardrails
- For adults only
- Not medical advice
- Do not share patient information
- Avoid unsupported claims that the app is objectively better than every competitor
